description: Hal Finney introduced the Reusable Proof of Work (RPOW) system in 2004 to address the double spending problem in digital cash systems.
topic_summary: The double spending problem allows digital assets to be copied and used multiple times, similar to pirated content. Finney's RPOW system mitigates this by registering token ownership on a trusted server for real-time verification [t=0:32].
